title: EnchantedSteak
description: Adds custom enchanted steak granting Haste effect.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The EnchantedSteak plugin introduces a custom food item, an enchanted steak, that grants players special abilities when consumed. This plugin adds a unique crafting recipe and custom effects for the enchanted steak, making it a valuable addition for servers looking to implement custom items, recipes, and enhanced survival mechanics. [Here is a comprehensive description of the plugin’s features and functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/45)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)

Join AshSource to share your work with a growing community! Get started now at [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
